title: Franklin County Commissioner Meeting

topics.title: IT Services Agreement Renewal
topics.speaker: TJ Burbank
topics.summary: Renewal of the county's IT services agreement. Labor rate is the primary contract change, aligned with rates charged to other counties.

key_points.label: Rate adjustment
key_points.detail: The labor rate is the main element changing in the renewal. Burbank stated the updated rate matches what he charges other counties for comparable professional IT services.

key_points.label: Effective date
key_points.detail: The agreement was approved effective June 8, 2026 (date of meeting), but the new labor rate is deferred until October 1, 2026 — the start of the new budget year — to avoid impacting the current fiscal budget.

key_points.label: Budget consideration
key_points.detail: Commissioners confirmed with Burbank that the current year's budgeted IT services amount would not change; the rate adjustment applies to the upcoming budget year only.

topics.citizen_takeaway: County IT contract renewed June 8, 2026. Your tax dollars for IT services this budget year stay as budgeted; labor rate increases begin October 1, 2026 with the new fiscal year.

disclaimer: Community summary for civic transparency. Not an official county record — verify against agendas, minutes, and recordings.
